title: selaginella sematophylla
intro: Selaginella sematophylla is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as a type of spikemoss. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella sematophylla is often used in tea or infusions, and it can also be dried and consumed as a powder or capsule.
